_comment: Single source of truth for the i18n-supported locales (Stage A/B). Consumed by tools/apps/web_runner/stage_assets.py (web playground language list) and scripts/ci/ci.sh via tools/apps/screenshot_generator/gen_gallery.py (multi-language screenshot gallery). Order = English first, then the rest alphabetical by English name (production lists native-first for users; these dev tools favor English for developers). Display label is 'english (native)' — English readable name first, native name/script second (collapses to just 'english' when they match). 'pack_locales' ship a fetched/registered font pack (Greek/Cyrillic/Vietnamese script packs + CJK corpus packs); the rest are covered by the baked OpenSans Western baseline. fa/hi/th are intentionally absent (no packs yet; Phase 2).
